title: Dependency Resolution: Pool Building and Solver
interaction_flow: Installer → Installer: run() — gc_disable(), check update/install mode
Installer → Installer: doUpdate(localRepo, doInstall) [if update mode]
Installer → Installer: createRequest(rootPackage, platformRepo, lockedRepository) → Request
createRequest: new Request(lockedRepository)
createRequest: request.fixPackage(rootPackage)
createRequest: request.fixPackage(platformPackages[])
Installer → Request: requirePackagesForUpdate() → request.requireName(name, constraint) for each root require/devRequire
Installer → Request: request.setUpdateAllowList(updateAllowList, transitiveMode) [if partial update]
Installer → RepositorySet: createPool(request, io, eventDispatcher, poolOptimizer, ignoredTypes, allowedTypes, securityFilter, filterListFilter)
RepositorySet: new PoolBuilder(acceptableStabilities, stabilityFlags, rootAliases, rootReferences, io, eventDispatcher, poolOptimizer, temporaryConstraints, securityFilter, filterListFilter)
RepositorySet: poolBuilder.setIgnoredTypes(ignoredTypes)
RepositorySet: poolBuilder.setAllowedTypes(allowedTypes)
RepositorySet → PoolBuilder: buildPool(repositories[], request) → Pool
PoolBuilder: iterate lockedRepository.getPackages() — populate skippedLoad[] or request.lockPackage()
PoolBuilder: iterate request.getFixedOrLockedPackages() — loadedPackages[name] = MatchAllConstraint, call loadPackage()
PoolBuilder: iterate request.getRequires() — packagesToLoad[name] = constraint, maxExtendedReqs[name] = true
PoolBuilder: LOOP while packagesToLoad not empty → loadPackagesMarkedForLoading(request, repositories)
loadPackagesMarkedForLoading: move packagesToLoad → loadedPackages
loadPackagesMarkedForLoading: chunk packagesToLoad into batches of 50
loadPackagesMarkedForLoading → RepositoryInterface: repository.loadPackages(batch, acceptableStabilities, stabilityFlags, loadedPerRepo) → {namesFound, packages}
loadPackagesMarkedForLoading → PoolBuilder: loadPackage(request, repositories, package, propagateUpdate)
loadPackage: packages[index] = package; aliasMap updated if AliasPackage
loadPackage: if rootAliases exist → create AliasPackage/CompleteAliasPackage, add to packages[]
loadPackage: foreach package.getRequires() → markPackageNameForLoading(request, requireName, linkConstraint)
markPackageNameForLoading: skip platform packages; extend packagesToLoad[name] constraint if needed
loadPackage: if propagateUpdate && transitiveDeps → unlockPackage() / markPackageNameForLoading() for skipped deps
PoolBuilder: filter temporaryConstraints — remove non-matching package versions
PoolBuilder → EventDispatcher: dispatch(PRE_POOL_CREATE, PrePoolCreateEvent) [if eventDispatcher set]
PoolBuilder: new Pool(packages[], unacceptableFixedOrLockedPackages[])
PoolBuilder → SecurityAdvisoryPoolFilter: runSecurityAdvisoryFilter(pool, repositories, request) → Pool
PoolBuilder → FilterListPoolFilter: runFilterListFilter(pool, repositories, request) → Pool
PoolBuilder → PoolOptimizer: runOptimizer(request, pool) → pool.optimize(request, pool) → Pool
PoolBuilder → RepositorySet: return Pool
RepositorySet → Installer: return Pool
Installer: new Solver(policy, pool, io)
Installer → Solver: solve(request, platformRequirementFilter) → LockTransaction
Solver: setupFixedMap(request) — fixedMap[package.id] = package
Solver: new RuleSetGenerator(policy, pool)
Solver → RuleSetGenerator: getRulesFor(request, platformRequirementFilter) → RuleSet
Solver: checkForRootRequireProblems(request, filter) — pool.whatProvides(name, constraint) for each require
Solver: new Decisions(pool); new RuleWatchGraph()
Solver: foreach rules → watchGraph.insert(new RuleWatchNode(rule))
Solver: makeAssertionRuleDecisions() — process assertion rules, record conflicts as Problems
Solver: runSat() [SAT solver main loop]
runSat: propagate(level) → watchGraph.propagateLiteral() per decision
runSat: iterate TYPE_REQUEST rules → selectAndInstall(level, decisionQueue, rule)
selectAndInstall → policy.selectPreferredPackages(pool, decisionQueue, requiredPackage) → literals[]
selectAndInstall → setPropagateLearn(level, selectedLiteral, rule)
setPropagateLearn: decisions.decide(literal, level, rule)
setPropagateLearn: propagate(level) — if conflict: analyze(level, rule) → [learnLiteral, newLevel, newRule, why]
setPropagateLearn: on conflict: revert(newLevel), rules.add(newRule, TYPE_LEARNED), decide(learnLiteral)
runSat: iterate all rules → selectAndInstall for unresolved
runSat: minimization step — revert branches to lower levels if possible
Solver: if problems > 0 → throw SolverProblemsException(problems, learnedPool)
Solver: return new LockTransaction(pool, presentMap, fixedPackagesMap, decisions)
Installer: lockTransaction.getOperations() → InstallOperation/UpdateOperation/UninstallOperation[]
Installer → Locker: setLockData(newPackages, devPackages, platformReqs, aliases, ...) — writes lock file
Installer → Installer: doInstall(localRepo, alreadySolved=true) [if doInstall=true]
Installer → Installer: doInstall(localRepo) [if install-only mode]
doInstall: createRequest(fixedRootPackage, platformRepo, lockedRepository)
doInstall: repositorySet.createPool(request, ...) — same pool-building flow with locked repo
doInstall: new Solver → solver.solve(request) → LockTransaction
doInstall: new LocalRepoTransaction(lockedRepository, localRepo) → operations
doInstall → InstallationManager: execute install/update/uninstall operations
key_relationships: RepositorySet creates PoolBuilder (new PoolBuilder in createPool)
PoolBuilder optionally_uses PoolOptimizer (optimize pool after build)
PoolBuilder optionally_uses FilterListPoolFilter (filter by allow/deny lists)
Pool indexes packages by name (packageByName map), assigns integer IDs
Request holds: fixed packages, locked packages, requires, updateAllowList

key_methods.PoolBuilder::buildPool: Entry point: orchestrates fixed/locked package handling, iterative loading loop, filters, optimizer, returns Pool
key_methods.PoolBuilder::loadPackagesMarkedForLoadin: Chunks pending names, calls repository.loadPackages() per repo per batch, delegates to loadPackage()
key_methods.PoolBuilder::loadPackage: Adds package to pool array, creates root aliases, recurses via markPackageNameForLoading() for each require
key_methods.PoolBuilder::markPackageNameForLoading: Extends or adds constraint to packagesToLoad, skips platform packages and maxExtendedReqs
key_methods.Pool::whatProvides: Cached lookup by name+constraint, delegates to computeWhatProvides()
key_methods.Pool::match: Checks direct name match or provides/replaces with constraint matching
key_methods.Solver::solve: Main entry: setupFixedMap → generateRules → makeAssertionRuleDecisions → runSat → LockTransaction
key_methods.Solver::runSat: DPLL-style SAT loop: propagate → selectAndInstall → analyze/revert on conflict → minimize
key_methods.Solver::setPropagateLearn: Decide literal, propagate, on conflict analyze+learn+revert+redecide
key_methods.RuleSetGenerator::getRulesFor: Generates install/conflict/require rules from pool packages and request

important_notes: LOAD_BATCH_SIZE=50 packages per batch. Partial update uses updateAllowList: locked-but-not-listed packages are added to skippedLoad and remain locked. Path-repo packages (dist=path, symlink=true) are auto-unlocked without transitive propagation. PoolBuilder resets all internal state after buildPool(). Pool assigns sequential integer IDs (starting at 1) used as literals in SAT solver. SolverProblemsException is thrown if solver cannot find a valid solution. LockTransaction is also run a second time in extractDevPackages() to identify which packages are dev-only.
